description_long: This object is a modern stealth fighter jet with a sleek, angular design and a low-profile fuselage. The wings are sharply swept back and blend smoothly into the body, contributing to its aerodynamic and radar-evading shape. Twin vertical stabilizers are canted outward at the rear, and a single engine exhaust is visible at the back. The cockpit canopy is smoothly integrated into the nose, with a dark, tinted appearance. The overall surface is matte and dark, with no visible markings, weaponry, or external equipment. The jet's form is compact and optimized for speed, maneuverability, and stealth.
description: A dark, angular stealth fighter jet with swept-back wings, twin canted stabilizers, and a streamlined, matte finish.
description_view_0: Front view shows the pointed nose, wide angular wings, and twin vertical stabilizers.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the jet's low profile, sharply swept wings, and streamlined canopy.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the single engine exhaust and the outward-canted twin stabilizers.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors the left profile, showing the same aerodynamic features and wing shape.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: solid dark color, no camouflage pattern visible
